summary: Login page crashes on Safari 17 when password field is empty
description: Users on Safari 17 experience a blank screen when submitting the login form with an empty password field. Reproduction: 1) Open Safari 17, 2) Navigate to /login, 3) Click Submit without entering password. Expected: validation error. Actual: white screen of death.

summary: Add bulk import for user stories from Excel
description: Product managers need to import 50+ user stories from Excel templates. Currently they create stories one by one. Acceptance: 1) Upload .xlsx file, 2) Map columns to Jira fields, 3) Preview before import, 4) Bulk create with progress bar.

summary: Dashboard load time exceeds 5 seconds with 1000+ tickets
description: Dashboard API takes 5-8 seconds to respond when the project has 1000+ tickets. Root cause: N+1 query on the ticket comments relationship. Needs query optimization and possibly pagination.

summary: Integrate Slack notifications for ticket assignment
description: When a ticket is assigned to a user, send a Slack DM notification with ticket link and summary. Configurable per user. Use Slack Bot Token. Acceptance: 1) User links Slack account, 2) On assignment, DM sent, 3) User can opt out in settings.

summary: Password reset email goes to spam on Gmail
description: Password reset emails are being marked as spam by Gmail. SPF and DKIM records are set but DMARC policy is too strict (p=reject). Need to adjust DMARC to p=quarantine and add proper Return-Path header.

summary: Add dark mode support across all pages
description: Users have requested dark mode. Need CSS variables for theming, toggle in user settings, and persist preference in localStorage. All 12 pages need to be updated.

summary: API rate limiting returns 500 instead of 429
description: When API rate limit is exceeded, server returns HTTP 500 instead of 429 Too Many Requests. This breaks client retry logic. Fix: return 429 with Retry-After header.

summary: Export sprint report to PDF
description: Scrum masters need to export sprint reports as PDF for stakeholder sharing. Report should include: sprint goal, completed tickets, carry-over tickets, velocity chart, burndown chart.

summary: User profile avatar upload fails for images > 2MB
description: Avatar upload silently fails for images larger than 2MB. No error message shown to user. Need: 1) Client-side file size validation, 2) Server-side compression, 3) Clear error message.

summary: Add epic-level progress tracking on roadmap view
description: Roadmap view currently shows epics as static cards. Need: progress bar per epic (completed stories / total stories), color coding by health (green/yellow/red), and ability to drill down.

summary: CORS error when frontend calls API from staging environment
description: Frontend deployed on staging.ba-assistant.com gets CORS error when calling API at api-staging.ba-assistant.com. CORS headers are missing in nginx config for the /api/v2/* routes.

summary: Add automated acceptance test pipeline for sprint stories
description: Currently acceptance tests are run manually before sprint release. Need: 1) GitHub Actions workflow, 2) Run tests against staging after deploy, 3) Block release if tests fail, 4) Slack notification with results.

summary: Search returns irrelevant results for multi-word queries
description: Full-text search treats multi-word queries as OR instead of AND. 'login password reset' returns any ticket with any of those words. Need: switch to AND logic with relevance scoring.

summary: Onboarding wizard for new users (3-step flow)
description: New users are confused by the empty dashboard on first login. 3-step wizard: 1) Create your first project, 2) Invite team members, 3) Import existing tickets. Skip option. Track completion rate in analytics.

summary: Database migration script fails on PostgreSQL 16
description: Alembic migration 0042_add_sprint_velocity uses a syntax deprecated in PostgreSQL 16. Migration fails with 'function jsonb_insert does not exist'. Need to update to JSONB_SET syntax.

summary: Add RBAC — role-based access control for enterprise tier
description: Enterprise customers need RBAC. Roles: Admin, Product Owner, Developer, Viewer. Permissions per role: create/edit/delete tickets, manage sprints, view reports. Integration with SSO (SAML 2.0).

summary: Comment @mention does not send email notification
description: When a user is @mentioned in a comment, no email notification is sent. Slack notification works but email is silent. Event handler for comment.created is missing the email notification step.

summary: Velocity chart shows wrong data after sprint name change
description: Velocity chart cached sprint data by name. When a sprint was renamed, the chart showed old data. Fixed by caching by sprint ID instead of name.

summary: Add sentiment analysis on user feedback comments
description: Run sentiment analysis (positive/negative/neutral) on all user feedback comments. Display aggregate sentiment per feature area on the product insights dashboard. Use a lightweight LLM API for classification.

summary: Audit log — track who changed ticket priority and when
description: Enterprise customers need audit trails. Log: field changed, old value, new value, who changed it, timestamp. Viewable per ticket and exportable as CSV. Retain for 90 days.
